diff:delete.comment: /* * Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0. (See accompanying * file LICENSE_1_0.txt or copy at http://www.boost.org/LICENSE_1_0.txt) */

diff:insert.comment: // Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0.
// (See accompanying file LICENSE_1_0.txt or copy at

unit.comment: // Disable unreachable code warning for the last test
// that is triggered when compiling as Win32|Release

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "A failing expression with a non streamable type is still captured", "[Tricky][failing][.]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "An expression with side-effects should only be evaluated once", "[Tricky]" )

unit.comment: // Tests for a problem submitted by Ralph McArdell
// The static bool value should not need to be defined outside the
// struct it is declared in - but when evaluating it in a deduced
// context it appears to require the extra definition.
// The issue was fixed by adding bool overloads to bypass the
// templates that were there to deduce it.

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Objects that evaluated in boolean contexts can be checked", "[Tricky][SafeBool]" )

unit.block: { SUCCEED(""); }
{ SUCCEED(""); }
{ SUCCEED(""); }
{ SUCCEED(""); }

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("#1514: stderr/stdout is not captured in tests aborted by an exception", "[output-capture][regression][.]")
